author: DanielOnDiordna
name: Player Tracker add-on
description: Add-on to the player tracker plugin: Adjust history limit of 3 hours to another value. Toggle name labels, last action time, toggle/adjust player colors, focus on players, display 1 single player. Integrated Marker Label plugin and Spectrum Colorpicker 1.8.1 plugin. Supports Machina _̶̱̍_̴̳͉̆̈́M̷͔̤͒Ą̷̍C̴̼̕ͅH̶̹͕̼̾Ḭ̵̇̾̓N̵̺͕͒̀̍Ä̴̞̰́_̴̦̀͆̓_̷̣̈́  player.
